raw_source.title: [Remote] Venturelabs is hiring a Community Manager, salary $4,000 - $5,000
raw_source.body:
Job Title: Community Manager

Location: Remote
Company: Venturelabs

About Venturelabs

Venturelabs is an early-stage venture capital fund supporting builders of Web3 and crypto infrastructure from the very beginning of their journey.

We believe Web3 and DeFi infrastructure form the foundation of the next generation of the internet. Our mission is to provide early-stage technical teams with funding, mentorship, and hands-on support to build scalable decentralized solutions.

Role Overview

We are looking for a proactive and strategic Community Manager to develop and strengthen the Venturelabs ecosystem.

This role plays a key part in building relationships with founders, developers, investors, and the broader Web3 community. You will shape the voice of Venturelabs and reinforce its positioning as a trusted partner in Web3 infrastructure.

Monthly Salary: $4,000–$5,000

Contact information: vntxlabs@vxnturelabs.com / Telegram: @VXNTURELABS

Key Responsibilities

Develop and manage communities across X (Twitter), Telegram, Discord, LinkedIn, and other relevant platforms

Design and execute community growth strategies aligned with the fund’s long-term vision

Engage founders, developers, and ecosystem participants

Moderate discussions and maintain a professional community environment

Track community metrics and optimize engagement strategies

Requirements

2+ years of experience in Web3 / crypto community management

Strong understanding of Web3, DeFi, and blockchain infrastructure

Experience managing X, Telegram, Discord, and other crypto-native platforms

Self-driven with strong remote work efficiency
